name: Morning Briefing
description: Provides a morning system status summary with date, uptime, and disk info
author: AgentOS

steps.description: Show date, system uptime and greeting
steps.command: $now = Get-Date; $os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $uptime = (Get-Date) - $os.LastBootUpTime; Write-Output "Good morning! Today is $($now.ToString('dddd, MMMM d, yyyy'))."; Write-Output "System uptime: $([math]::Floor($uptime.TotalHours))h $($uptime.Minutes)m"

$disk = Get-PSDrive C; $free = [math]::Round($disk.Free/1GB,1); $mem = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $freeMem = [math]::Round($mem.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB,1); Write-Output "Disk C: ${free}GB free | RAM free: ${freeMem}MB"
